summary: Russian forces have deployed the new heavy "Hexa-crane" drone, which destroyed a Ukrainian shelter near Konstantinovka using a TM-62 anti-tank mine. The "Elka" anti-drone system has intercepted multiple Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs, including "Maya" and "Darts," with kinetic strikes causing onboard charges to detonate. A rare Russian "Klin" drone was shot down; it carries up to 5 kg of payload, has a 120 km range, and uses advanced Li-AFB batteries. FPV drones continue to target Russian Ka-52 helicopters, with crews eliminated during evacuation attempts. Iranian-backed militias also used fiber-optic FPV drones to attack US forces at Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport.
